failedAssertions.reason: Canonical `npx spikes-mcp` clean run returned npm E404 (package not found), and local tarball fallback still failed downloading aarch64-apple-darwin binary with HTTP 404; MCP initialize did not succeed.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: NPM MCP Wrapper section with isolated-workspace, clean-cache, fallback, and evidence requirements.
